recipes.title: Avocado Toast with Egg
recipes.description: A delicious and healthy start to your day.
steps: Mash the avocado and spread it on the toast.
Fry the eggs and place them on top.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

recipes.title: Vegan Buddha Bowl
recipes.description: Nourishing bowl full of greens and grains.
steps: Roast the sweet potato and chickpeas.
Massage the kale with olive oil.
Assemble the bowl and drizzle with tahini dressing.

recipes.title: Lemon Garlic Pasta
recipes.description: Tender, golden-brown chicken breasts smothered in a rich, velvety garlic and mushroom cream sauce. A one-pan wonder that pairs perfectly with pasta, rice, or mashed potatoes.
ingredients: Mushrooms: 250g sliced brown or button mushrooms.
Cream: 1 cup heavy cream (or cooking cream).
Herbs: 1 tsp dried thyme and a handful of fresh parsley.
steps: Sear the Chicken: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken for 5–7 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Remove and set aside.
Sauté Mushrooms: In the same pan, melt the butter. Add mushrooms and sauté until they release their moisture and turn golden brown.
Aromatics: Stir in the minced garlic and dried thyme. Cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Simmer the Sauce: Pour in the heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer. Reduce heat to low and stir in the Parmesan cheese until the sauce thickens slightly.
Combine: Place the chicken back into the skillet, spooning the sauce over it. Let it simmer for another 2 minutes to heat through.
Serve: Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
